Preset.name: Clean Vocal
Preset.description: Transparent vocal chain for natural lead vocals.

Preset.name: Modern Pop
Preset.description: Bright modern pop vocal with polished compression and air.

Preset.name: Warm Ballad
Preset.description: Warm smooth lead vocal for ballad and soft music.

Preset.name: Bright Female
Preset.description: Clear bright female vocal with controlled sibilance.

Preset.name: Male Rock
Preset.description: Forward male rock vocal with grit and stable level.

Preset.name: Acoustic Vocal
Preset.description: Gentle acoustic vocal with preserved dynamics.

Preset.name: Rap Vocal
Preset.description: Fast aggressive rap vocal with tight dynamics and presence.

Preset.name: Soft Female
Preset.description: Soft female vocal with controlled highs and smooth opto compression.

Preset.name: Deep Male
Preset.description: Deep male vocal with low-end cleanup and warm density.

Preset.name: Vocal Glue
Preset.description: General-purpose vocal glue preset for final chain polish.

Preset.name: Live Clean
Preset.description: Safe live vocal preset with natural noise control.

Preset.name: Live Powerful
Preset.description: Stronger live lead vocal with compression and presence.

Preset.name: Live Karaoke
Preset.description: Karaoke vocal chain with bright top and limiter safety.

Preset.name: Live Band
Preset.description: Stage preset for band mix with tighter gate and mid focus.

Preset.name: Small Stage
Preset.description: Compact stage preset with feedback-safe tone shaping.

Preset.name: Large Stage
Preset.description: Large stage preset with wider image and polished highs.

Preset.name: Podcast Voice
Preset.description: Clean spoken voice with controlled low end and consistent loudness.

Preset.name: Speech Clear
Preset.description: Clear speech preset focused on intelligibility.

Preset.name: Narration
Preset.description: Warm narration preset for long-form spoken content.

Preset.name: Broadcast FM
Preset.description: Dense broadcast-style voice with strong level control.

Preset.name: Vintage Tube
Preset.description: Vintage tube color with rounded transient response.

Preset.name: Tape Color
Preset.description: Tape-style saturation with thicker low mid character.

Preset.name: Air Vocal
Preset.description: Extra air and sheen for glossy vocal effects.

Preset.name: Wide Vocal
Preset.description: Wider vocal image while keeping lead energy centered.

Preset.name: Radio Voice
Preset.description: Hyped radio voice with compression and saturation.

Preset.name: Lo-Fi
Preset.description: Lo-fi vocal color with darker top and stronger saturation.
